title: Classic British Beef Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting dish made with ground beef, rich gravy, and tender vegetables, perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: In a large pan over medium-high heat, cook the ground beef until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the onion, carrots, and potatoes to the pan and continue cooking for 5 minutes.
Add the flour to the pan and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the beef stock, red wine, and tomato paste to the pan, stirring to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the mushrooms to the pan and continue simmering for another 5 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with a lid.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and the vegetables are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot.
